title: Bhagavad Gita 11: The Vision of the Universal Form
description: Arjuna sees Krishna's true form — all of reality, all beings, all time contained in one infinite body.
introduction: Arjuna sees Krishna's true form — all of reality, all beings, all time contained in one infinite body.

translation.original_text: divi sūryasahasrasya bhaved yugapad utthitā | yadi bhāḥ sadṛśī sā syād bhāsas tasya mahātmanaḥ
translation.text: If the light of a thousand suns were to blaze all at once in the sky, that would be like the splendor of that great soul.
